claims.text: Index, Gather, Forum, Crucible, and Telos operator checks all returned MATCH during pass 0002.
claims.falsification: any named tool returned DRIFT, UNVERIFIABLE, or error in recorded pass output

claims.text: The pass 0002 Gather web intake gathered 8 sources, kept 6, dropped 2, and produced digest seal 02f7a178c8290ba4ac8153259f5935573adce465318657d25961bc95070f702a.
claims.falsification: recorded gather_run output has gathered not equal to 8, kept not equal to 6, dropped not equal to 2, or a different digest seal

claims.text: Forum routed quantum computing and robotics/control into the project-telos lane while escalating PQC, energy-grid, neuroscience/interpretability, finance/systemic-risk, epidemiology, and formal/compiler availability.
claims.falsification: recorded Forum outputs do not show those two project-telos routes and those six escalations

claims.text: The Bell-state probe produced normalized probabilities within floating-point tolerance and zero non-Bell probability mass.
claims.falsification: probability sum error exceeds 1e-12 or non-Bell mass is nonzero

claims.text: The SIR probe conserved total population within 1e-9.
The toy RSA probe decrypted back to the original message.
claims.falsification: recorded decrypted value does not equal the original message

claims.text: The scalar closed-loop control probe had absolute eigenvalue below 1 and decreased energy over the run.
claims.falsification: absolute eigenvalue is at least 1 or final energy is not lower than initial energy

claims.text: The Build Color probe round-tripped sRGB through Oklab with max error below 1e-12 and produced monotonic ACES and PQ outputs.
claims.falsification: roundtrip max error exceeds 1e-12 or either monotonic check is false

claims.text: Pass 0002 promotes zero natural-law discoveries; all domain outputs remain hypotheses, probes, source leads, or architecture plans.
claims.falsification: any pass 0002 artifact labels a new natural law, solved theorem, validated medical conclusion, trading result, or robotics safety result as promoted
